name: io.github.yourusername/netlicensing-mcp
title: NetLicensing MCP Server
description: MCP server for the Labs64 NetLicensing license management REST API. Manage products, modules, license templates, licensees, licenses, and shop tokens — plus five built-in audit prompt templates.

environmentVariables.name: NETLICENSING_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your NetLicensing API key (leave empty to use demo credentials)

environmentVariables.name: NETLICENSING_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the NetLicensing API base URL
